overall.description: A first-person cable car journey through a futuristic cyberpunk metropolis, beginning with views of highway traffic below, crossing a large body of water, then traversing dense urban canyons with towering neon-lit buildings. The ride includes a brief stop at a station platform before continuing through the elevated cityscape. The footage exhibits high-quality game engine rendering characteristic of Cyberpunk 2077.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with a view from a cable car traveling over a busy highway, with vehicles including a motorcycle visible below. Around the 3-second mark, the scene transitions as the car moves from the highway overpass to crossing a large body of water, with industrial docks visible in the distance. The perspective remains elevated throughout, framed by the cable car's teal support structures.

large suspension bridge structure spanning across the water
brutalist concrete high-rise with grid-patterned windows
seated passenger in dark clothing visible through the side window

segments.scene_description: The cable car exits the open water area and approaches the dense urban skyline. The scene transitions from waterfront to urban as the car passes close to a reflective glass skyscraper on the right and a concrete office building on the left. A passenger becomes visible seated inside the car. The water recedes to the left as the cityscape dominates the view.

cable car navigates a curved path through the urban canyon with buildings on both sides

complex multi-level highway interchange with curved ramps

segments.scene_description: The cable car briefly enters a covered station structure with distinctive yellow panels before emerging into a dense urban canyon. The environment becomes enclosed with skyscrapers blocking most of the sky. The car navigates a curved path past a teal office tower and under elevated highway interchanges, with holographic billboards visible on the buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated cable car station platform with safety barriers

events.description: cable car slows to a complete stop at the station platform
cable car departs from the station, accelerating back into the urban canyon

agents.ego_description: stationary at the platform, observing the metal mesh barriers and illuminated signage before departing

chain-link safety fence with illuminated signage behind it

segments.scene_description: The cable car comes to a complete stop at an elevated station platform enclosed by metal mesh safety barriers. An illuminated sign with partial 'FAIL' text is visible through the fencing. The lighting shifts to artificial as the car waits at the platform for approximately six seconds before departing.

segments.scene_description: The cable car departs the station and accelerates through the dense urban canyon, passing through an area with steam or smoke effects. The view features a massive face billboard on a building facade and sweeping curved elevated highways. The car continues through the narrow corridor between towering buildings with various digital advertisements visible.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous cable car journey that transitions from an open industrial waterfront into the claustrophobic, neon-lit depths of a futuristic urban canyon. It begins by gliding over a busy highway filled with traffic before moving across a wide body of water toward distant industrial docks, all framed by the car's teal support structures. As the water recedes, the perspective shifts into the city, passing between reflective glass skyscrapers and concrete offices before briefly entering a yellow-paneled station structure. The camera then navigates a curved path under elevated interchanges and holographic billboards, eventually coming to a complete stop at a mesh-fenced platform under artificial lighting. Finally, the car accelerates away from the station, pushing through plumes of steam and past massive digital face billboards as it plunges deeper into the narrow corridor of towering buildings.
